Desc: You carefully inspect the strange tattoos covering the corpse in the morgue. The sheriff beside you holds out the deceased's effects.
Indescribable whispers drift through the air from the Mist blanketing the streets.
Strange patterns are carved into the altar. The same markings cover the parchments scattered across the floor.
The ballroom of the noble manor stands empty. All that remains is a stain-covered guest register that has been sealed tight.
In the theater's dressing room, a strange sketch lies within the hidden compartment of a famous actress' makeup box.
The officer inventories the unmarked package with your help, but the documents inside are obscure and indecipherable.
Thick fog shrouds the dock. The remains of a large, oddly-shaped fish lie washed ashore by the waves.
After the fire, only the archive's fireproof safe survives.
In an alley in the slums, the dark stains seeping from the walls seem to resemble some form of familiar writing.
On a night when a storm rages, an eerie shadow repeatedly passes by outside the tall bedroom window.
A fortune teller grabs you at the street corner and keeps repeating a prophecy about the approaching Mist.
In the window of an antique shop at the street corner, you quietly gaze at an amber ornament with patterns of retinal veins within.
The lighthouse keeper on a remote island has mysteriously vanished, leaving behind a diary filled with writings on the fear of the deep sea.
There is no cargo in the hold of a confiscated smuggling ship, except for several stone tablets carved with bizarre patterns.
LeftDesc: Trace the patterns on the tablets
RightDesc: Call for a priest to pray over this

Desc: In a freshly developed crime scene photo, a blurry shadow vaguely appears behind the victim.
LeftDesc: Examine the shadow with a magnifying glass

Desc: A police officer patrolling the streets walked into an eerie mansion but never came out.
At an auction, the fog in an oil painting of a misty forest seems to be faintly shifting as everyone watches.
A strange letter was delivered to your mailbox, instructing you to attend an appointment at a location that doesn't exist.
LeftDesc: Drink some hot tea to calm down

Desc: A librarian walked into a library that had never been opened, locked himself in, and never came out.
LeftDesc: Examine the books in the library
RightDesc: Call for a priest to pray

Desc: In the storage room of a post office, dark green liquid slowly seeps from an unclaimed package.
On the sheets of an empty bed in a hospital ward, dark red bloodstains faintly seep through.
In the thick fog at the dead of night, a carriage stands before you, but there is not a soul inside.
Graves in the cemetery have been dug up in the dead of night, but the exposed coffins contain no bodies. Only viscous sludge remains.
A hospital has received many insomnia patients. They all report dreaming of a faceless "deity."
RightDesc: Ask the patients about the dream

Desc: In the corner, a spider ceaselessly weaves its web, and the pattern woven into it appears to resemble some kind of strange writing.
An old music box turns, playing a low, somber melody. An eerie murmuring seems to lurk within the music, barely perceptible.
The statue in the church has developed massive cracks. Within them, a scroll and some rusted coins are barely visible.
In the ticket booth of an abandoned opera house, a money box that wasn't taken remains locked tight, yet a pungent smell emanates from within.
At the black market, a grave robber peddles ancient gold coins still covered in fresh dirt.
In the deserted psychiatric hospital, countless scattered medical records are covered in bloodstains.
LeftDesc: Pick up the bloodstained medical records

Desc: A mysterious scholar's estate is being auctioned off. You purchase his collection of ancient coins at an extremely low price.
A strange glow emanates from the dried well in the abandoned manor, and you notice faint metallic glimmers among the salvaged debris.
In the shadows of an abandoned bell tower, a group of people gather in a circle and engage in silent prayer, their heads bowed and eyes closed.
The morgue's metal door suddenly swings open, and a body wrapped in white cloth slowly approaches you.
RightDesc: Call for a priest to pray

Desc: On a silent street corner, the branches of tall roadside trees stir in the wind, casting shifting shadows across the ground that dance like phantoms.
RightDesc: Try to break off the branches

Desc: A grating sound suddenly rings out from behind the stage curtain in the opera house. A massive puppet slowly crawls into view.
Fine cracks spread across the vine relief on the room's wall, as if the carved vines had once grown.
In the psychiatric hospital, a patient in a straitjacket crawls through the hallway on his back, his limbs twisted at impossible angles.
In the abandoned garden, a starving hound lets out cries that sound almost human.
LeftDesc: Drink some hot tea to calm down
RightDesc: Draw your weapon and stay alert

Desc: A trail of bloody footprints appears on the Mist-shrouded street. Where the footprints end, only a blood-stained coat remains.
In the room of a long-missing sailor, a photo with the face cut out is tucked inside a diary left behind.
Strange writing in lipstick marks the dust-covered makeup mirror in the theater.
Standing on the dock, you watch the lighthouse in the distance flash repeatedly, as if transmitting some kind of strange code.
A tattered newspaper clipping lies in the long-abandoned psychiatric hospital, documenting a mass patient escape from years ago.
An autopsy report reveals that the deceased's stomach contained nothing but a set of keys.
An admission ticket appears on your desk. The abbreviated location written on it is an underground club that seems to have never existed.
The antique shop owner tries to sell you an old music box, claiming it plays a siren's song.
LeftDesc: Open the music box and listen to the song
RightDesc: Refuse to listen to the music box

Desc: At the stroke of midnight, the music box by your bedside starts playing on its own. Its eerie melody bores into your mind.
RightDesc: Throw the music box out the window

Desc: As the music swells to a crescendo, the music box shatters without warning. A grotesque chunk of flesh tumbles out from within.
An oil painting of a starry night hangs on display in the gallery. Stare at it long enough, and the stars across the canvas seem to be burning slowly.
The gallery owner has dropped dead under mysterious circumstances. Clutched in his hand is a key that doesn't open a single door in the gallery.
The lighthouse on the island stands completely dark. As you approach in a small boat, the sea breeze carries a nauseating, fishy stench.
LeftDesc: Force your way onto the island
RightDesc: Cover your nose with a handkerchief

Desc: At the tower entrance, slimy scales lie scattered about, seemingly shed from some unknown creature.
At the top of the tower, the keeper whose body has already mutated pays no heed to your arrival, simply keeping its head bowed in prayer.
The mutated tower keeper finally seems to notice you. It turns its twisted face toward you and lurches forward, completely out of control.
LeftDesc: Draw your weapon and stay alert

Desc: Workers repairing the street claim they've unearthed a treasure, but it's just a stone slab inscribed with strange runes.
LeftDesc: Make a rubbing of the runes
RightDesc: Tell the workers to bury the stone slab

Desc: While studying the rune-inscribed stone slab alone in your room, the runes suddenly begin to ooze a blood-like slime.
RightDesc: Get rid of the stone slab

Desc: Corrosive, blood-like slime flows across the table, inscribing patterns into the surface. They are identical to those on the stone slab.
LeftDesc: Wipe away the marks on the table

Desc: The train bound for the suburbs enters a thick fog. The temperature inside the car plummets, and layers of frost patterns begin forming across the windows.
LeftDesc: Try to decipher the frost patterns

Desc: The door connecting the train cars slams open. The attendant that bursts through is unrecognizable, its face twisted beyond recognition, arthropod limbs thrashing from its sleeves.
RightDesc: Try to dodge the flailing limbs

Desc: A gas lamp on the street flickers incessantly, like a giant monster's constantly blinking eyes.
Dark red stains linger on the wall of the morgue, as if left behind as cryptic messages when the dead came back to life.
LeftDesc: Trace the symbols in your notebook
RightDesc: Try to wipe away the stains

Desc: The dolls in the shop window sit in neat, orderly rows, and all their glass bead eyes turn to stare at you.
In a cramped hotel room, the grating sound of fingernails scraping is coming from behind the wall connecting to the adjacent room.
No one knows when the mail carrier stopped coming to the mailbox at the street corner, and letters continue to spill from it like snowflakes.
A closed carriage drives down the street, leaving intermittent wheel tracks on the road, and faint whispers drift from within.
In the banquet hall, the liquid in the wine glass suddenly emits a metallic, bloody smell, and strange sediment can be faintly seen at the bottom.
LeftDesc: Touch the sediment at the bottom
RightDesc: Identify the smell of the liquid

Desc: On the walls of the orphanage are countless eyes that were drawn by children in crude, childish strokes.
The shrill cries of countless rats echo faintly deep in the sewers.
RightDesc: Try to drive away the gathered rats with stones

Desc: A funeral procession emerges from the thick fog, but knocking sounds can be heard from inside the coffin.
You feel a strange spike in your trench coat pocket.
In the clockmaker's shop, countless clocks tick, their hands moving backward eerily.
You break open the fragrant meat pie in your hands to find pale finger bone fragments inside.
A gray-bearded pharmacist tries to sell you eye drops that supposedly let you see the "truth."
In an empty church, a black cat slumbers on the abandoned altar, its eyes closed.
RightDesc: Call for a priest to pray over this

Desc: The water in the plaza fountain has long since dried up, replaced by dark slime.
RightDesc: Carefully reach out and touch it

Desc: A massive strange fish drifts slowly toward you on a calm river, reeking of decay.
LeftDesc: Cover your nose with a handkerchief
RightDesc: Try to scoop up the strange fish

Desc: You gaze at your reflection in the puddle, and you think you see it smile at you.
The glass of a museum display case suddenly shatters, revealing rare treasures that gleam with enticing light.
RightDesc: Try to touch the item in the display case

Desc: The pocket watch in your hand suddenly stops, then its hands begin moving backward.
RightDesc: Close your eyes and don't look at the watch

Desc: A ragged beggar sits by the roadside, his hat containing only writhing insects.
LeftDesc: Ask your companion whether to help him
RightDesc: Drop a coin into his hat

Desc: You quietly stare at a yellowed group photo in the window of the photography studio. All the faces in the photo are blacked out.
LeftDesc: Try to wipe the stains off the photo

Desc: On the theater stage, the opera singer's voice seems to have some kind of hypnotic power.
RightDesc: Cover your ears and stop listening

Desc: The theater box is empty, and programs covered in bloody handprints are scattered on the floor.
In the barbershop, jet-black hair like twisted limbs is scattered on the floor.
LeftDesc: Try to reach out and touch the strands

Desc: The baker takes the freshly baked bread out of the oven, but all of it has turned into charred, twisted, monstrous shapes.
You've lost your way in the Mist-filled streets. Suddenly, a lighthouse that cannot possibly exist appears before you.
The sheriff hands you an autopsy report, which shows that the deceased's internal organs have all been devoured by rats.
Numerous bizarrely-shaped statues are faintly visible inside an old dried-up well in the suburbs.
RightDesc: Raise a lantern to investigate the bottom of the well

Desc: A skeletal stray dog suddenly bursts out from the Mist, its deep growling seemingly mimicking human speech.
In the police station's archive room, strange black gas emerges from the mountainous pile of old case files.
RightDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert

Desc: In your shadow on the ground, a hand that doesn't exist appears along the edge of your neck, slowly closing in on you.
LeftDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert
RightDesc: Raise a lantern to dispel the shadow

Desc: At the auction, the featured lot is a bizarre animal specimen, its species unidentifiable.
LeftDesc: Buy it at a high price
RightDesc: Step forward and smash the jar with the specimen

Desc: The printing press at the newspaper suddenly malfunctions. Every newspaper it prints bears only a single line of unintelligible text, and it resembles an evil incantation.
At the fortune-telling stall on the street, every tarot card displays strange dark patterns.
RightDesc: Defend against the fortune teller's sudden attack

Desc: While he is trying to dig up a grave to steal its burial goods, the gravekeeper on night patrol suddenly falls into madness.
A strange, pitch-black bird perches on your windowsill, pecking relentlessly at the glass with its sharp beak.
RightDesc: Try to drive away the bird

Desc: In the cold night, the frost on the bedroom window slowly forms into barely legible text.
LeftDesc: Smash the glass to see what's outside
RightDesc: Trace the pattern in your notebook

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nEven under the cover of night, moving through the city as a group of "Aberrations" is still extremely dangerous.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nJust then, the faint sound of a carriage drifts in from a distant street corner.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe coachman's face is hidden beneath the canopy's shadow. Without a word, he gestures for you to get in.

<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYour footsteps echo through the street. In the dark, it's hard to tell where you are going, and it feels as though you have been walking the same path over and over.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nFarther down the street, you see the same carriage again.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou accept this timely "kindness," board the carriage, and deliberately tuck yourself into the deepest corner of the cabin.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nSitting in the cramped carriage, you slowly begin to feel a nagging sense of unease.
RightDesc: Lift the curtain and look outside

Desc: <color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nIn the faint moonlight, you see his head twitch strangely. Then it jerks again, even harder than before.
RightDesc: Tighten your grip on the gun and aim at him

Desc: <color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nFinally, his head twists around and faces you. That strange smile is still there.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nA foul smell rises from the coachman, thick with the stench of blood and flesh, mixed with the cold stink of sewage.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nCountless tentacles extend from his neck, and at their ends hangs his swaying head, still wearing a smile.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nChurning clouds swallow the waning moon. The street ahead blurs, and only your footsteps echo through the road.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nFog rolls in, and a familiar voice calls your name again and again from within it.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe voice in the fog grows louder, but nothing stands where it should be. It may be nothing but a ghost.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nNo matter which way you go, the voice is everywhere. Now it only repeats, "You will die."
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe temperature drops bit by bit, and the cold sinks deep into your bones.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe air around you feels as if it is slowly freezing.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nSomething unseen seems to be drawing closer.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA strange mass of shadow appears before you, hovering close enough to touch and giving off a cold, bloody smell.
LeftDesc: Raise the gas lamp toward the shadow

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou keep walking, but the air around you keeps growing colder.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nBone-piercing cold wraps around you, seeping slowly into your body.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nShadows spread before you like ink dissolving in water, blurring your sight.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe shadow twists into the shape of a person, though extra limbs seem to grow from its body.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe "human" made of shadows finally collapses, melting into a thick pool of black water with a choking smell.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe black water churns and burns until a rectangular stone shape rises from it. It looks like a tombstone.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nBy the gas lamp at the street corner, you make out the name on the "tombstone." It is yours.
LeftDesc: Turn away and reject the illusion
RightDesc: Dig up the grave and inspect it

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nSomething cold begins to creep up your ankle.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou look down and see slick tentacles stretching out from the fog, slowly reaching for you.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nPain stings where the monster's tentacles touch your skin, and a strange dizziness clouds your mind.
RightDesc: Let the dizziness and tentacles take hold

Desc: <color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA cold feeling follows you through the corridor, as if unseen eyes are always watching from behind.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nAt the end of the corridor, a door opens on its own, its rusted hinges shrieking.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nDark clouds cover the moon, leaving the midnight sky heavy and lightless.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA few gas lamps are the only light along the long street.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou walk down the long street, dim light stretching your shadow out behind you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe street is so quiet that every footstep on the stone road sounds clear.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nWith each step you take, another gas lamp goes out behind you.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nIn the dark, countless tiny red lights blink into view, pulsing in a steady rhythm.
RightDesc: Let your eyes adjust to the dark

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nWhen the last lamp goes out, the street falls into complete darkness.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou wait until your eyes adjust to the thick darkness around you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nFaint noises begin to stir, the sounds of some strange animal.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThen countless tiny red lights appear in the dark, blinking in a steady rhythm.
RightDesc: Let your eyes adjust to the dark

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAt last, you realize where the red lights are coming from.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nCountless rat eyes are staring straight at you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe bloated rats drag themselves along the silent street.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou watch the strange rats in confusion, but they pay you no attention.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThey simply form a head-to-tail line and crawl slowly toward somewhere unknown.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAt your dismissive gesture, the rats scatter without a sound and vanish into the dark street.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nA moment later, they crawl back out and fall back into the same formation.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe long line of rats keeps moving at the same pace toward the house at the end of the street.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou do not disturb the marching rats. Instead, you follow carefully behind them.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThey march in perfect order down the silent street, heading for a house at the far end.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe front door is shut tight, but rats file one by one through a broken pane in the tall window.
RightDesc: Try to pry the door open

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAt the far end of the once-empty corridor, a door you have never seen before appears, emanating faint candlelight.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nOn the door, you see a pair of slender bloody handprints. They seem to belong to someone you know.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA heavy smell of blood seeps through the crack of the closed door.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nStrange sounds echo through the empty banquet hall, like mindless chanting mixed with an unnatural wind.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou look around, but aside from the empty hall, nothing seems out of place.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\n"Help me... Help me..." The monotonous, hoarse voices repeat again and again in your ears.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nA cold wind slips through the doorway and snuffs out the flickering candles.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe sound grows louder and clearer, and you know for certain it is not the wind.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nFinally, you realize the strange sounds are coming from the mouth of a pale plaster statue in the corner.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nBehind you, a door opens with a sharp, grating sound.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe "guests" enter the banquet hall one after another in perfect order, without a word.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThere seems to be no life in their eyes, only blank emptiness.
RightDesc: Try to blend into their group

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe banquet hall is gone. Fog surrounds you, and you can no longer tell whether this place is real or only another illusion.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA rough path barely shows beneath your feet. At its end, a gas lamp flickers faintly.
LeftDesc: Stay where you are and watch carefully

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nA faint figure appears not far ahead.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThat figure looks uncannily familiar. It appears to be you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe other "you" keeps stopping and moving on, as if trying to draw your attention.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou quicken your pace, but the distance between you never seems to shrink.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nStrange curiosity pushes you to walk faster. You need to know what that figure really is.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nSomething unseen seems to keep the figure just out of reach.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nFinally, you catch up. The figure is close enough to touch.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe moment you touch the other "you," it turns into a wisp of black mist and coils around your fingers.
RightDesc: Inspect the black mist on your hand

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou try to circle around and approach the figure unseen.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nBut no matter how hard you search, you find nothing.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nFinally, you hear heavy footsteps behind you.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou turn around and find the figure that looks just like you standing silently behind you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe figure that looks exactly like you stares down at you with cold contempt.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nIt says nothing and does not move, yet an invisible pressure bears down on you.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nWith the slightest motion, the figure changes shape, becoming something like a god with blurred features, impossible to look at directly.
LeftDesc: Close your eyes and try to make the vision fade

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou sit alone at the long banquet table. The chairs are neatly arranged, but every seat is empty.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nIn the silent hall, the only sound is the ticking of the grandfather clock. Midnight is almost here.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nAt last, the clock strikes midnight. Then its hands begin to turn backward.
RightDesc: Check whether the grandfather clock is broken

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou notice an invitation on the table. Its envelope is beautifully decorated, but stained by age.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou reach out and open the invitation.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nOn the yellowed paper, your name is the only one that belongs to the living. The rest are names you saw in the graveyard.
LeftDesc: Get up and leave the banquet hall

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nOn the silent street, you hear a carriage drawing closer.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nA sealed hearse slowly comes into view, pulled by horses so black they almost blend into the night.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nBehind the hearse, the mourners softly chant a funeral song, but their voices don't sound human.
RightDesc: Fall into the rhythm of their chant

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe hearse moves farther away, yet the soft singing from that direction grows clearer.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nBut they don't seem to be heading toward the cemetery.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe lead mourner senses you. "This is your funeral," he rasps.
LeftDesc: Hide in the darkness at the street corner

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nOn the altar, candlelight flickers around a white marble statue of the Holy Mother, surrounded by fresh flowers.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe pure Holy Mother statue gazes down with lowered eyes, watching everything, watching you. A faint smile seems to rest on her stone face.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nSuddenly, eerie crimson trails begin to run from the Holy Mother statue's eyes.
LeftDesc: Reach out and touch the "blood tears"

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\n"You are devout. The Holy Maiden will grant you holy water." The flat praise comes from behind you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou turn and see a figure wrapped in black robes. Its face is hidden, with only a pair of withered hands exposed.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe figure says nothing and simply offers you an ornate chalice.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nIn the chalice held by those hands, strange insects writhe through the scarlet liquid, giving off a sweet, bloody smell.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou look away from the Holy Maiden's statue and notice a black-robed figure nearby, as if it appeared out of thin air.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\n"Why not show your devotion?" The black-robed figure slowly approaches, his voice flat and lifeless.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nHe says nothing more. His withered hands reach toward you, holding out the chalice.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nStrange insects writhe in the scarlet liquid, giving off a sweet, bloody smell.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe candle flame trembles almost imperceptibly, and the shadows on the altar flicker with it.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAs the light and shadows shift, you realize the black-robed figure has vanished without you noticing.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou look down and find the chalice before you has been empty all along.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou force yourself to resist the strange events around you and continue down the path you must take.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nExpressionless attendants stand in your way, cold light glinting from their weapons.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThey say nothing, but silently block your path to the Holy Maiden.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nSunlight passes through the stained-glass windows, washing the prayer room in strange, shifting colors.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nFrom beyond the heavy door comes the faint, solemn sound of a pipe organ.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe music begins to sound more like a heartbeat. For a moment, it feels less like a prayer room and more like the belly of some monster.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nBeneath the altar, a huge silver vessel is filled to the brim with clear water.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAs you draw near, the still water suddenly begins to churn.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nAs the ripples spread, patterns like eyes begin to appear on the water.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nUnder the night sky, the graveyard is silent. All you hear is your own footsteps over the thick fallen leaves.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nIn the darkness, the only light comes from the fireflies circling in the air.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe fireflies drift before you, their pale glow like lanterns carried by ghosts.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe fireflies gather until their glow reveals a fresh, open grave.
RightDesc: Raise the lantern and look closer

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou walk over and study the grave by the fireflies' faint glow. Your shadow falls across it.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe grave soil is soft, covered in layers of rotting leaves and smelling of earth and trees.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nEverything before you seems to be offering a strange, unsettling invitation.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\n"Try lying here." A strange voice whispers faintly by your ear.
LeftDesc: Shake your head and reject the voice

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou raise the lantern for a closer look, but even its bright light can't reach the shadow you cast across the grave.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThick rotting leaves cover the soft grave soil, filling the air with the scent of earth and trees.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nFor some reason, the fresh soil and the smell of rotting leaves stir something strange in your mind.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\n"Try lying here." The thought appears in your mind without warning, almost impossible to resist.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou turn to leave, but can't help looking back at the grave one more time.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nCountless fireflies flicker in the dark, still circling overhead.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nFor a moment, you glimpse a shadowy figure sinking into the grave soil, as if finally relieved of its burden.
RightDesc: Step closer and inspect the grave soil

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nMore and more fireflies gather in the dark, forming a cold moon that seems to hang in empty space.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nUnder the cold glow of the "moon," ghostlike shadows rise from the graves.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThey draw closer, carrying a cold, rotten stench.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nDust blankets the long-abandoned manor, as if everything inside has been frozen in time.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nOn the dust-covered steps, a line of slender footprints slowly appears, leaving clear marks behind.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe footprints continue down the corridor and disappear at the far end.
RightDesc: Crouch down and inspect the footprints

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nJust before dawn, damp mist fills the air, blurring the tall windows of the abandoned manor.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nFaint, erratic lines begin to show on the fogged glass.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe lines appear, vanish, then appear again, as if the "ghost" drawing them is never satisfied.
LeftDesc: Stay away from the strange window

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou walk through an illusory field. No matter where you look, all you see is wheat swaying in the wind.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAs you walk through the thick wheat field, faint tremors rise from deep under your feet.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe movement beneath the soil becomes clearer. It pulses in a steady rhythm, almost like a heartbeat.
LeftDesc: Press yourself close to the field

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou reach for a heavy rice stalk, bent low by the weight of its grain, and try to pull it from the soil.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe roots hold far more firmly than expected. You pull harder without meaning to, and finally, the soil around the stalk begins to give way.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA pale finger bone shows through the loosened soil, faintly flickering with ghostly light.
RightDesc: Reach out and touch the finger bones

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou no longer know where you are. Everything around you has fallen into a frozen silence.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nVague shadows begin to take shape before your eyes.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou know they are only illusions, yet getting close still feels dangerous.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou walk through the illusory hall. Candles burn brightly. Tables and chairs stand in perfect order. Heavy velvet curtains hang around you, red as blood.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nIt feels as though a grand celebration has been prepared for your arrival.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nBut the "guests" seated at the table are not human. They are dust-covered dolls.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe doll's joints hang loose, held together only by countless threads.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou step closer to examine the old dolls.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAs if sensing you, the dolls turn their heads together. Their thread-bound joints grind with a low, dry rasp.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nWhile your eyes stay fixed on the dolls, a thread quietly winds around your finger.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThen something sharp pricks your fingertips.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou reach out and touch the dolls carefully. It feels cold and hard beneath your fingers.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYour touch seems to wake them. The dolls turn their heads all at once, their hollow eyes fixed on you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAs you lean in to study the doll, threads slip silently from its joints and curl around your fingers.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nPain stings through the fingers caught in the thread.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nA drop of blood slips from the cut left by the thread.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nDrip. A faint sound reaches your ears: blood landing on the doll.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nFor a moment, you think you see the doll blink. Once. Then again.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nBetween illusion and reality, faint ripples drift through the air like moving water.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou know this is the threshold where illusion ends and reality begins.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe moment you cross the boundary, the false hall and its countless dolls collapse into ash behind you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou walk down the corridor, each step sinking into the thick, soft carpet.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou take a deep breath. No dust. No musty smell. Only clean, cool air.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nFor some reason, the moment you enter, the tension in your body is gone. For the first time in a long while, you feel at peace.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThis place is nothing like the areas you explored before. Everything here makes you feel safe.
RightDesc: Walk to the end of the corridor

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou find a warm, cozy room filled with candy, dolls, a phonograph... everything a child could love.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe sisters nestle close together, wrapped in their carefree happiness.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nLaughing, they unwrap candies for each other and savor the sweetness.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYour feet carry you into a room filled with candy, dolls, a phonograph... everything a child could love.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nIn this little world of their own, the sisters spend their carefree time together.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nTogether, they brush the doll's hair and dress it in new clothes...
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe sisters are lost in their own happiness, and they seem eager to share it with you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThey come closer and hold out their small hands.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\n"You must be tired after walking all this way." Their faces light up with bright, sunny smiles.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou pick your way through a tangle of threads, careful as if crossing a dense and dangerous web. You have no idea what waits at the other end.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nA nameless dread lingers in your mind. Every nerve tells you that something dangerous is getting closer.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nFinally, you see a figure that feels almost familiar. But whatever stands before you, it does not feel alive.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nEverything seems to be over. Late at night, you walk through the quiet city, trying to calm the thoughts still churning inside you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nAfter walking for so long, your mind begins to drift. Your feet keep moving on their own, carrying you toward somewhere you don't know.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nIn the darkness, you spot a lone building in the distance. You are sure you have never seen it before.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nThe building is unfamiliar, yet something about it puts you strangely at ease.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou open the door and step into the small building. There are no lamps inside, only a single candle.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou light the candle. A cold, faint glow spreads through the dark, like a lantern carried by a ghost.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nFinally, you stop chasing the secrets of this strange building. You push the door open and step back into the night.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]]</color>\nYou turn back, only to find the building you just left has vanished. Behind you is nothing but a long, empty street.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nShapes begin to emerge in the fog-choked street. More and more monsters are slowly closing in.
LeftDesc: Stay away from the approaching shadows

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nAt the end of the police station corridor, strange sounds echo from the abandoned records room.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThrough the crack in the door, you see the flickering light of a gas lamp inside the room.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou step into the room. A thick notebook sits on the table, its cover adorned with strange patterns.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe moment you turn around, a strange notebook appears at your feet, its cover adorned with peculiar markings.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nEvery page of the notebook bears your name, but the handwriting grows more distorted with each one.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nOn the last page of the notebook, the ink spelling your name has turned a deep crimson.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou walk alone through the night, when suddenly a torrential downpour begins to fall from the sky.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nThrough the cold rain, you see a small cabin appear ahead.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe wooden cabin is worn and abandoned, showing no signs of anyone living inside.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nA damp smell fills the room. The cold, clinging moisture feels almost tangible.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA wave of exhaustion overwhelms you, and at last, you can no longer resist the pull of sleep.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nStanding beneath the eaves, the curtain of rain still bars your departure. You have nowhere to go.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou have waited far too long, and an irresistible exhaustion washes over you. You can no longer fight the urge to sleep.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nWithin the chaotic dreamscape, you see a dense forest where whispers drift through the trees.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe eerie whispers of "go to the forest" keeps echoing in your mind.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nIn the thick fog, you can barely make out the sights on the street.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA glimmer of light suddenly appears ahead, like a beacon guiding your way.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nAs you draw closer, a bright gas lamp appears before you.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nIt seems to have been standing silently in the thick fog all this time, waiting for you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nTaking a different path, you walked for a long time through the darkness.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nNo matter which way you walk, that bright gas lamp refuses to leave your sight.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nThe glow of the gas lamp is brilliantly bright, yet you have noticed something else amiss.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nBathed in the light, a host of strangely familiar shadows appeared behind you.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe movements of those shadows seem to be reaching out to you for help.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nYou walk through the forest, treading on a thick layer of dead branches and fallen leaves.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThough near noon, the dense canopy blocks the sun, leaving the woods dark.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nThe wind picks up, rustling through the branches and leaves of the forest with a faint sound.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nEven after the wind dies down, you still hear sounds coming from the forest.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nThe sound from the forest grows clearer and clearer, echoing endlessly in your mind.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nIt was a faint whisper, calling your name over and over again.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nBy the cold, pallid light of the moon, you walk alone through fields that were harvested just earlier in the day.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou notice that the scarecrow by the farmfield seems somehow different from the impression you had of it during the day.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nThe rags are gone. The scarecrow is now wearing a neat suit.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThere is no wind, yet the scarecrow slowly turns toward you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nDark red fluid slowly oozes from the scarecrow's empty eyes.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nAt that very moment, you catch the sound of a faint, elusive laugh.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nYou wander through the deserted ancient castle, a faint and peculiar odor drifting to your nose.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nFollowing the dim, narrow corridor, you arrive at a dust-laden room.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe strange instruments in the room make you realize this was once some kind of "laboratory".
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nThe moment you touch the dust-covered instruments, a strange sense of déjà vu invades your mind.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nIt seems as though many "people" once existed here.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nEven keeping your distance from those instruments, a strange sense of déjà vu instantly floods your mind.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nAmidst those strange feelings of déjà vu, it seems as though many "people" once existed here.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nAt last, you turn and leave that strange room.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou realize this might be a hint that there are still secrets here you don't know about.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nWithin the massive structure, there seem to be countless rooms and corridors.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nNo matter which direction you move, you hear a piercing, agonized shriek.
LeftDesc: Search for the source of the sound

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nThe voice sounds somewhat familiar, yet somehow utterly strange.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nAt the same time, you hear a jumble of footsteps drawing closer, yet there is no one beside you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nOn the dust-covered floor, a trail of strange footprints quietly appears.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe footprints suddenly turn, as if leading you somewhere unknown.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nIn this labyrinthine building, you have long since lost track of how long you've been walking.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYou pull out your pocket watch, only to find that its hands have stopped at some unknown moment.
RightDesc: Stop keeping track of the time

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nA strange sensation creeps into your thoughts. The enemy you were just fighting has vanished without a trace.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nYet every detail of that battle remains etched into your mind.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nCandlelight flickers and wavers, casting monstrous shadows throughout the building.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nA strange dark shadow closes in on you, instantly enveloping your body.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nA coldness unlike anything you've ever felt grips your senses.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nAt some point, a strange dark shadow slowly crept toward you, enveloping your body.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nAn unfamiliar coldness seizes your senses in an instant.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nWithin the shadows, you find it growing harder and harder to breathe.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nYou realize that the unseen "enemy" is slowly drawing closer.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nIn the shadow of the "enemy," you catch a glimpse of an eerie light.
LeftDesc: Attack the light that seems to be its "weakness"

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nAt last, the dark shadow begins to slowly dissipate.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nOnly a pool of foul-smelling black liquid remains on the ground before you.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nAs the setting sun sinks behind the treetops, a thin mist slowly drifts in around you.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nThe moment the last ray of sunlight fades, the mist thickens until it feels almost solid.
<color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nThe ground beneath your feet suddenly grows warm and soft, as though it were alive.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nWith every step you take, it feels as though you are walking upon the body of some enormous "living thing."
RightDesc: Press your ear to the ground and listen

Desc: <color=#CDA05A>[Tale Progress]</color>\nA deep, ancient voice rises from beneath the earth, as if the forest itself is trying to "speak" to you.
<color=#E74354>[Tale Choice]</color>\nYet the meaning behind that voice is utterly beyond your comprehension.
A portrait remains after a fire, untouched by the flames, and the figure in the painting appears to gaze at you at every angle.
That night, the portrait that should be in pieces reappears on your desk, miraculously restored to its original condition.
LeftDesc: Try to take apart the frame

Desc: The sewer grate keeps rattling, as if something unseen is trying to break free.
RightDesc: Aim your gun at the sewer depths

Desc: The grate suddenly bursts apart with a crash, and reeking sewage gushes out.
LeftDesc: Try to collect a sewage sample
RightDesc: Cover your nose with a handkerchief

Desc: In the thickening fog, a shadowy figure slowly takes form.
LeftDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert

Desc: In the clockmaker's shop, all the clock hands have stopped at exactly twelve o'clock.
The silent clockmaker suddenly turns around, with a clock gear embedded in his hollow eye socket.
A barnacle-encrusted wooden crate washes up on the dock late at night.
RightDesc: Resist the urge to open it

Desc: Inside the strange wooden crate lies only a bizarre "egg" that is constantly pulsating.
The "egg" in the wooden crate suddenly cracks open, and a many-legged monster crawls out.
The only thing left behind by the nameless dead is a diary. Every single page is covered in eerie spiral patterns.
In a hidden basement, a group of cultists hold hands, chanting incomprehensible hymns.
You board a train at midnight, only to find every passenger's face is blurred and indistinct.
LeftDesc: Try to talk to the passengers

Desc: The train suddenly enters a tunnel you've never seen before, with murky, bloody water surrounding it on all sides.
A grotesque figure shatters the train window with its tentacles, trying to drag you deep into the Mist outside.
A blind fortune teller offers to read your fortune, inviting you to draw a card.
The fortune teller shows you a card depicting the Abyss, with countless ghastly pale hands reaching out from within.
The owner of the puppet shop quietly pushes a cart filled with porcelain dolls in the dead of night, vanishing around the street corner into darkness.
RightDesc: Approach and ask if she is all right.

Desc: You enter an empty basement and see many ghastly pale teeth scattered across the floor.
LeftDesc: Pick up the teeth and examine

Desc: A strange creature springs out from the corner of the basement, opening its gaping maw and spraying foul slime at you.
A bag full of coins lies unclaimed. Numerous rats approach, ready to make their move.
An unknown opera is being performed in the opera house, but the audience seats are completely empty.
At the climax of the performance, the singer on stage suddenly lets out a piercing shriek.
LeftDesc: Discern the message in the singer's voice

Desc: The dancer on the stage tears apart the lavish costume, transforming into a hideous monster that lunges toward the seats below.
A strange creature springs out from the corner of the basement, opening its gaping maw and spraying foul slime at you.
The dancer on the stage tears apart the lavish costume, transforming into a hideous monster that lunges toward the seats below.
The guard of the graveyard sits at the gate, smiling to every passerby eerily.
At the abandoned dock, the surfaces of shipping containers are gradually being covered by slimy, fishy-smelling seaweed.
On his deathbed, the trembling asylum director presses a badge engraved with an eyeball into your palm.
Your pocketwatch makes a strange noise. After taking it apart, you discover jet-black hair tangled between the gears.
In an old bookshop, you discover an untitled manuscript locked with chains.
RightDesc: Try to pry open the chains

Desc: A ragged wanderer approaches you, trying to trade the strange medicine bottle in his hand for a little food.
RightDesc: Ask him what's in the medicine bottle

Desc: The silent clockmaker suddenly turns around, with a clock gear embedded in his hollow eye socket.
A grotesque figure shatters the train window with its tentacles, trying to drag you deep into the Mist outside.
In the attic of a long-abandoned theater, numerous cracked mirrors are embedded in the walls.
RightDesc: Smash a mirror to see what's behind

Desc: Walking through the streets at night, you suddenly discover countless strange eyes lighting up in the display windows on both sides of the street.
In a dead-end alley with no exit, a shadowy figure blocks your way.
A strange gray stone sculpture failed to sell at the auction.
RightDesc: Offer to buy the stone sculpture

Desc: In the cracks of the archive room's floor lies a twisted, rusty key.
Along the fog-shrouded riverbank, strange phosphorescent light flickers in the river.
In the thickening fog, a shadowy figure slowly takes form.
LeftDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert

Desc: In a hidden basement, a group of cultists hold hands, chanting incomprehensible hymns.
A piece of evidence never seen before suddenly appears in an evidence bag in the police station. It is a strange piece of sealing wax.
Deep inside a fireplace in an abandoned manor, an old photo lies among the ashes, partially burned but not destroyed.
In a jewelry store, a brooch in the shape of a spider draws no interest.
Upon seeing you approach, a black market merchant selling strange potions wraps a cloak tight and hurries away, leaving behind a single potion.
RightDesc: Try to call out and stop the merchant

Desc: A child from the orphanage hands you a puppet, but its eyes are destroyed.
In the museum, a clay tablet covered in strange writing rests in a neglected display case.
The morgue's metal door suddenly swings open, and a body wrapped in white cloth slowly approaches you.
RightDesc: Call for a priest to pray

Desc: In the psychiatric hospital, a patient in a straitjacket crawls through the hallway on his back, his limbs twisted at impossible angles.
A skeletal stray dog suddenly bursts out from the Mist, its deep growling seemingly mimicking human speech.
In your shadow on the ground, a hand that doesn't exist appears along the edge of your neck, slowly closing in on you.
LeftDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert
RightDesc: Raise a lantern to dispel the shadow

Desc: The printing press at the newspaper suddenly malfunctions. Every newspaper it prints bears only a single line of unintelligible text, and it resembles an evil incantation.
While he is trying to dig up a grave to steal its burial goods, the gravekeeper on night patrol suddenly falls into madness.
In the cold night, the frost on the bedroom window slowly forms into barely legible text.
LeftDesc: Smash the glass to see what's outside
RightDesc: Trace the pattern in your notebook

Desc: In the thickening fog, a shadowy figure slowly takes form.
LeftDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert

Desc: A strange creature springs out from the corner of the basement, opening its gaping maw and spraying foul slime at you.
The silent clockmaker suddenly turns around, with a clock gear embedded in his hollow eye socket.
In the thickening fog, a shadowy figure slowly takes form.
LeftDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert

Desc: The morgue's metal door suddenly swings open, and a body wrapped in white cloth slowly approaches you.
RightDesc: Call for a priest to pray

Desc: In the psychiatric hospital, a patient in a straitjacket crawls through the hallway on his back, his limbs twisted at impossible angles.
A skeletal stray dog suddenly bursts out from the Mist, its deep growling seemingly mimicking human speech.
In your shadow on the ground, a hand that doesn't exist appears along the edge of your neck, slowly closing in on you.
LeftDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert
RightDesc: Raise a lantern to dispel the shadow

Desc: The printing press at the newspaper suddenly malfunctions. Every newspaper it prints bears only a single line of unintelligible text, and it resembles an evil incantation.
While he is trying to dig up a grave to steal its burial goods, the gravekeeper on night patrol suddenly falls into madness.
In the shadows of an abandoned bell tower, a group of people gather in a circle and engage in silent prayer, their heads bowed and eyes closed.
On a silent street corner, the branches of tall roadside trees stir in the wind, casting shifting shadows across the ground that dance like phantoms.
RightDesc: Try to break off the branches

Desc: A grating sound suddenly rings out from behind the stage curtain in the opera house. A massive puppet slowly crawls into view.
Fine cracks spread across the vine relief on the room's wall, as if the carved vines had once grown.
In the abandoned garden, a starving hound lets out cries that sound almost human.
LeftDesc: Drink some hot tea to calm down
RightDesc: Draw your weapon and stay alert

Desc: In the police station's archive room, strange black gas emerges from the mountainous pile of old case files.
RightDesc: Raise your gun and stay alert

Desc: At the auction, the featured lot is a bizarre animal specimen, its species unidentifiable.
LeftDesc: Buy it at a high price
RightDesc: Step forward and smash the jar with the specimen

Desc: At the fortune-telling stall on the street, every tarot card displays strange dark patterns.
RightDesc: Defend against the fortune teller's sudden attack

Desc: A strange, pitch-black bird perches on your windowsill, pecking relentlessly at the glass with its sharp beak.
RightDesc: Try to drive away the bird

Desc: In a hidden basement, a group of cultists hold hands, chanting incomprehensible hymns.
The dancer on the stage tears apart the lavish costume, transforming into a hideous monster that lunges toward the seats below.
A grotesque figure shatters the train window with its tentacles, trying to drag you deep into the Mist outside.

RightDesc: Try to call out and stop the merchant

Desc: A child from the orphanage hands you a puppet, but its eyes are destroyed.
In the museum, a clay tablet covered in strange writing rests in a neglected display case.
The guard of the graveyard sits at the gate, smiling to every passerby eerily.
At the abandoned dock, the surfaces of shipping containers are gradually being covered by slimy, fishy-smelling seaweed.
On his deathbed, the trembling asylum director presses a badge engraved with an eyeball into your palm.
Your pocketwatch makes a strange noise. After taking it apart, you discover jet-black hair tangled between the gears.
In an old bookshop, you discover an untitled manuscript locked with chains.
RightDesc: Try to pry open the chains

Desc: A ragged wanderer approaches you, trying to trade the strange medicine bottle in his hand for a little food.
RightDesc: Ask him what's in the medicine bottle

Desc: In the attic of a long-abandoned theater, numerous cracked mirrors are embedded in the walls.
RightDesc: Smash a mirror to see what's behind

Desc: Walking through the streets at night, you suddenly discover countless strange eyes lighting up in the display windows on both sides of the street.
In a dead-end alley with no exit, a shadowy figure blocks your way.
A strange gray stone sculpture failed to sell at the auction.
RightDesc: Offer to buy the stone sculpture

Desc: In the cracks of the archive room's floor lies a twisted, rusty key.
Along the fog-shrouded riverbank, strange phosphorescent light flickers in the river.
A piece of evidence never seen before suddenly appears in an evidence bag in the police station. It is a strange piece of sealing wax.
Deep inside a fireplace in an abandoned manor, an old photo lies among the ashes, partially burned but not destroyed.
In a jewelry store, a brooch in the shape of a spider draws no interest.
Upon seeing you approach, a black market merchant selling strange potions wraps a cloak tight and hurries away, leaving behind a single potion.
RightDesc: Try to call out and stop the merchant
